query:
SELECT ga.agent_name, ga.level, 
  ga.equipped_weapon, ga.equipped_offhand, ga.equipped_head, ga.equipped_body, 
  ga.equipped_hands, ga.equipped_feet, ga.equipped_ring_a, ga.equipped_ring_b,
  ga.equipped_necklace, ga.equipped_amulet
FROM game_agents ga
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT ga.agent_name, ga.level, 
  ga.equipped_weapon, ga.equipped_offhand, ga.equipped_head, ga.equipped_body, 
  ga.equipped_hands, ga.equipped_feet, ga.equipped_ring_a, ga.equipped_ring_b,
  ga.equipped_necklace, ga.equipped_amulet
FROM game_agents ga
LIMIT 5;
